meta.pageDescription: Pick deliverables and scope a website or app build—indicative pricing only; final quotes after discovery.
meta.heroSubtitle: Wonderland cyber-lane for website builds (website): punch the line items you need on a glowing ticket—still not a final quote, just a very honest riddle with price hints.
meta.stickyDisclaimer: Indicative pricing only. Final quotes depend on discovery, scope, integrations, and timeline. Prices change; this page may lag.
meta.longDisclaimer: Totals on this page are not binding estimates. Third-party fees (registrar, hosting, app stores, payment processors, AI or creative tool subscriptions) are usually billed to you directly unless we agree otherwise in writing. Selecting items does not create an obligation for either party.
meta.mailSubject: À la carte build — scope from portfolio

questionnaire.title: Phase 1 — quick context
questionnaire.description: Optional, but helps the first email or call go faster.

options.label: Brochure / marketing site
options.description: Explain the product, team, or offer—mostly content.

options.label: Storefront / bookings
options.description: Sell, book, or collect leads with integrations.

options.label: Game or demo promo
options.description: Trailer, embeds, download links, stream hooks.

steps.question: Who owns the words and media?

options.label: I'll supply copy & assets
options.description: You have text, logos, and imagery ready.

options.label: I need help with copy or media
options.description: Expect a separate content pass or referrals.

options.label: Mixed
options.description: Some ready, some to figure out together.

options.label: Keep it static / simple JS
options.description: No framework unless we agree later.

options.label: Square or POS — not Stripe
options.description: Payments lean on Square or your stack.

options.label: Flutter mobile is in play
options.description: Mobile app or companion path matters.

categories.label: Foundation
categories.description: What the site is built with. Pick one.

items.label: Static HTML, CSS & vanilla JS
items.description: Fast, portable pages—great when you want a ZIP or any static host and minimal build tooling.

priceHint.basis: Landing scope; more sections and CMS hooks move the quote.

items.label: Next.js / React (App Router)
items.description: Component-driven site with routing, SEO primitives, and room to grow into richer apps.

priceHint.basis: Depends on page count, auth, data layer, and integrations.

categories.label: Information architecture
categories.description: How visitors move through the build. Pick one.

items.label: Single scrolling page + section jumps
items.description: One URL, anchored sections, back-to-top—simplest narrative flow.

priceHint.basis: No extra line when staying on one scrolling page.

items.label: Multi-page site + one extra landing
items.description: Several routes or sections as separate pages plus one campaign-style landing.

priceHint.basis: Scales with templates, nav, and duplicate layouts.

categories.label: Hosting & deploy
categories.description: Where it lives and how pushes go out.

items.label: You bring hosting
items.description: I deliver artifacts and notes; you plug into your provider.

priceHint.basis: Assumes clear deploy target.

items.label: Vercel or Netlify setup
items.description: Project wiring, env vars, previews, and handoff checklist.

priceHint.basis: Vendor plans billed separately.

items.label: Static bucket + CDN sketch
items.description: S3/R2-style bucket, cache hints, and TLS outline—not enterprise DR.

priceHint.basis: Infra fees pass through to your cloud bill.

items.label: Square-forward commerce
items.description: Links, embeds, or flows that respect Square as source of truth—not a Stripe swap.

priceHint.basis: Depends on catalog depth and fulfillment rules.

items.label: Stripe Checkout / billing hooks
items.description: When you want Stripe-native checkout or customer portal patterns.

priceHint.basis: Excludes complex subscription ledgers and tax—scoped in discovery.

items.label: Forms → email / CRM handoff
items.description: Resend, Formspark-class patterns, spam controls, and success states.

priceHint.basis: Per form family and provider.

items.label: Analytics that respect privacy
items.description: Lightweight events or Plausible-class—no ad pixel soup unless you ask.

priceHint.basis: Tooling subscriptions may be extra.

items.label: Flutter slice (mobile)
items.description: Focused Flutter deliverable: screens, build flavors, store checklist guidance—scope locked in discovery.

priceHint.basis: Large apps split milestones; stores charge separate fees.

items.label: PWA wrap
items.description: Manifest, service worker shell, offline placeholder, install cues—paired with a web build.

priceHint.basis: Heavy offline data moves into custom quote.

categories.label: Media
categories.description: Video and motion on the page.

items.label: Video pipeline
items.description: Lazy embeds, posters, captions file hookup, and performance passes.

priceHint.basis: Encoding or long-form editing is out of scope unless added.

items.label: Case-study layout system
items.description: Repeating patterns for problem → role → outcome → gallery.

priceHint.basis: More case studies, more templates.

items.label: JSON-driven portfolio sections
items.description: Like this site: edit content in data files, keep layout stable.

priceHint.basis: True headless CMS wiring is a separate line.

items.label: Playable prototype / vertical slice
items.description: One core loop, scoped mechanics, Web or Godot embed path—explicitly not a full production title.

priceHint.basis: Art pipeline, networking, and live ops are separate phases.

items.label: MCP-assisted workflow pass
items.description: Time-boxed efficiency using MCP-style tooling in the stack—scoped deliverables, not open-ended API spend.

priceHint.basis: Pass-through API or seat costs discussed upfront.

items.label: PixelLab asset pass
items.description: One structured generation pass (characters, tiles, or props) aligned to your art direction.

priceHint.basis: Your PixelLab subscription or agreed credit bundle.

items.label: Basic CI (lint + build)
items.description: GitHub Actions (or similar) to guard main—no full QA matrix.

priceHint.basis: Monorepos or deploy keys add time.

categories.label: Subscriptions (vendor-side)
categories.description: Creative or AI tooling tiers—client-owned accounts recommended.

items.label: Rosebud-class creative tool alignment
items.description: I align exports and workflow with a Rosebud-style tier—you keep the subscription; I don't resell seats. Month-one onboarding can be bundled in a quote if we agree.

priceHint.basis: Indicative only; check current vendor plans. Not a line item unless we explicitly bundle onboarding hours.

items.monthlyNote: Recurring fee billed by the vendor to your card unless we agree pass-through in writing.
